{{Quote|With oursa treasury restocked, there is noah need to fight oursa neighbors. Wesa will join yousa Gallo.|Hantic joins forces with Boss Gallo|<ref name="GB" />}}
'''Hantic''' was a [[Ankura/Legends|Ankura]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who was the [[Boss/Legends|boss]] of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Otoh Langua/Legends|Otoh Langua]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3000 BBY]]. During a period of [[War of the Gungan tribes|war]] between the Gungans around that [[Time/Legends|time]], Otoh Langua's treasury was severely depleted, forcing the city's inhabitants to continue fighting. Eventually, Hantic was visited by Boss [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]], who was attempting to unite the Gungans against [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]], the boss manipulating the war. Hantic told Gallo that Otoh Langua would join his cause if he found a way to restore the city's wealth, which Gallo did by destroying one of Rogoe's [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]]. Hantic thanked Gallo for aiding their city and contributed forces to Gallo's [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Grand Army]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Wesa have problems of oursa own. The wars have depleted oursa treasury. But if wesa stop fighten now, there will be no way to get back oursa wealth.|Hantic, telling Gallo of their city's troubles|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:Otoh_Langua.jpg|thumb|left|280px|Hantic in Otoh Langua]]
Hantic was a [[Ankura/Legends|Ankura]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and served as the [[Boss/Legends|boss]] of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Otoh Langua/Legends|Otoh Langua]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3000 BBY]].<ref name="EA" /> During Hantic's reign in Otoh Langua, Naboo's various Gungan cities were at [[War of the Gungan tribes|war]] with each other, and as a result Otoh Langua lost a vast amount of its resources, forcing Hantic to continue fighting until they could find a solution. In the war Otoh Langua also formed a rivalry with the city of [[Otoh Jahai]], whose [[Tenko|Boss]] accused Hantic of stealing their city's [[Sacred Staff]], an important religious artifact. However, Hantic denied the claim and had not actually stolen the [[Staff/Legends|staff]].<ref name="GB" />

Eventually, [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]], the former boss of the ruined city of [[Otoh Sancture]], came to Otoh Langua as part of his crusade to unite the Gungan tribes against Boss [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]], who was controlling the war and had [[Destruction of Otoh Sancture|destroyed]] Gallo's city. Gallo asked Hantic if they had stolen the staff from Otoh Jahai, where he had previously visited and had agreed to find it, but Hantic stated that they did not have the staff. Hantic then told Gallo that if he somehow restored Otoh Langua's wealth, they would join Gallo's cause. On advice from his ally [[Marsune (Gungan)|Marsune]], Gallo and his [[Militiagung/Legends|militiagungs]] attacked a [[Rogoe's spaceport|spaceport]] that belonged to Rogoe and stole its supplies to give to Hantic. In turn, Hantic thanked Gallo for helping him and donated four [[Kaadu/Legends|Kaadu Cavalry]] members, domesticated bipedal [[Kaadu/Legends|kaadu]] mounted with [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]] on their backs, to Gallo's [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Grand Army]].<ref name="GB" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Otoh Jahai isen crazy! Wesa do not have their artifact! Until theysa realize dat, there will be fighten between usen.|Hantic, when Gallo questioned him about stealing Otoh Jahai's sacred staff|<ref name="GB" />}}
During the war against the other Gungan tribes, Hantic, a [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned member of their species, was forced to keep their people fighting in order to sustain their city but was very willing to seek a peaceful solution when Gallo asked him to cease combat. Hantic was also quite offended when Gallo asked if they had stolen Otoh Jahai's Sacred Staff and remarked that the other city was crazy for saying so.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The boss of Otoh Langua was first described as a voice heard by the player in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' by [[Steven L. Kent]],<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>—released on [[November 7]], [[2001]]<ref name="PrimaDate">{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Galactic-Battlegrounds-Official/dp/0761537503|text=Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}}</ref>—before appearing and being identified in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="GB" /> released on [[November 11]], 2001.<ref name="GBDate">{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}</ref> Hantic appeared in the second level of the Gungan campaign, "The Gungan who would be Boss." Hantic's profile image is used for several other Gungan boss characters in the game, and their voice actor was uncredited.<ref name="GB" />
